arts.ttl: Preview: FC Twente vs. Ajax - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Eredivisie clash between FC Twente and Ajax, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Ajax's last Eredivisie match saw them triumph 3-2 over PSV at home to extend their unbeaten streak to eight, putting them in second spot on 25 points through 10 matches. They are five points behind fi...
